name: Team Yang
subject: Progress to goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
If you’re fired up about an Andrew Yang presidency -- or even just fired up about Andrew’s candidacy in this race -- now’s the time to step up.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=5&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l) Yang Gang --

We knew that hitting another $2 million goal by the end of our Iowa bus tour was going to be a challenge.

**Here’s the good news:** So many of you have stepped up, dug deep, and made a contribution toward this goal already. The support you continue to give is incredible.

**Here’s the bad news: We are less than halfway to goal and have only four days left to hit it.

[Can you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford right now to help us close the gap?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=13&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=7&amount=25&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)
---
If you’re fired up about an Andrew Yang presidency -- or even just fired up about Andrew’s candidacy in this race -- now’s the time to step up.

If we fail to hit this goal, we risk not being able to make the investments we need in Iowa and not having enough voters hear Andrew’s message in time. We’re working around the clock to make sure we hit this goal but we simply can’t do it without you.

**Give now:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/two-million-goal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=6)**

Thank you for having Andrew’s back,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19569?t=14&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4632%2E377263%2EgNaO4l) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

New York, NY

name: Taylor, MJ Hegar TX Finance Director
subject: bumping for MJ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
In case you missed the news today:

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e7/7f51f7bc/4a5d7e51/4ef0fca1/1202782802/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **MJ for Texas**

Goal: **$20,000**
Amount still needed: **$10,611**

Deadline: **Friday**

**[DONATE NOW >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e7/7f51f7bc/4a5d7e51/4ef0fca0/1202782802/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191211.2nd__613__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
In case you missed the news today, team:

We're still $10,611 away from our goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the week. With the last FEC deadline of 2019 just weeks away, **now is not the time to get off track.

[Will you read my email below and then pitch in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e7/7f51f7bc/4a5d7e51/4ef0fca0/1202782802/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191211.2nd__613__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks!
\-- Taylor, MJ for Texas
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar Finance Team**
Subject: Goal vs. Raised vs. Remaining
> I'll cut to the chase, team.
>
> **We need to raise $12,714 before the end of the week from our online supporters. Will you donate right now to help?**
> [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e7/7f51f7bc/4a5d7e51/4ef0fca0/1202782802/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191211.2nd__613__&amount=10&recurring=true")
> ---
>
>
> [**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e7/7f51f7bc/4a5d7e51/4ef0fca0/1202782802/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191211.2nd__613__&amount=10&recurring=true")
> We set our budget carefully based on weekly, monthly, and quarterly goals; this allows us to hire campaign staff, fuel MJ's travel across the state to talk to voters (she's already driven 10,000 miles!), and build the infrastructure we need to defeat Senator Cornyn.
>
> With the last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year coming up in less than three weeks, **now is not the time to get off track.[Will you pitch in today toward the $12,714 we need to close out the week and stay on pace?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e7/7f51f7bc/4a5d7e51/4ef0fca0/1202782802/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191211.2nd__613__&amount=10&recurring=true")
>
> MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs, so she's relying on folks like you to power this campaign. Thanks for all that you do.**
>
> \-- Taylor Klos, TX Finance Director
>
>
>
> [**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e7/7f51f7bc/4a5d7e51/4ef0fca0/1202782802/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191211.2nd__613__&amount=10&recurring=true")

|
---

name: info@michaelbennet.com
subject: please, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Since Michael hasn't spent a lifetime in politics, many voters are just learning about him.

Polls show that up to 2/3 of voters in this race are still undecided, and with less than two months until the first ballots are cast, we need to reach out to as many undecided voters as possible.

[That's why Michael committed to holding 50 town halls in the final 10 weeks across New Hampshire, promising not to leave until he's answered every last question he's asked.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba963/134673f2/918a3d5/6997b796/885842134/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**We 'll be honest, team - we need support from grassroots donors like you to keep Michael on the road. So we're asking you for help: It would mean so much if you'd rush $5 to keep Michael on the road >> **](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba963/134673f2/918a3d5/6997b795/885842134/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Cory Booker
subject: Two billionaires walk into the race...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Since my team sent this email, it has been reported that Michael Bloomberg has committed _**even more money**_ in advertising buys -- and _**has blown past $100 million.**_ It's no secret that we're being far outspent in this race -- which is why I'm asking for your help. **[Will you help us raise the funds to get ads up on the air, too? Click here to chip in.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191211_CB_20191211-fr-CB-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory
_\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Check out these numbers, team: Tom Steyer has spent _**over $79 million**_ on ads so far. Michael Bloomberg has spent _**almost $100 million**_ \-- in just two weeks! This may sound like a lot, and that's because it is. Especially when you consider that _all the other Democratic candidates combined have spent just**$28.3 million**_. **Team, it 's no secret that our campaign -- and the campaigns of candidates who are not self-funding their runs -- are being far outspent. Will you chip in to help us compete?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191211_CB_20191211-fr-CB-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191211_CB_20191211-fr-CB-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

We're not going to be able to match this level of spending any time soon. But frankly, we believe that we don't need millions and millions of dollars for Cory's message to resonate with caucus-goers and voters.
Here's what we know to be true -- **the more people know about Cory, the more they like him**. Now's the time to introduce more folks to Cory and our campaign by reaching Americans across the country.
**[Our campaign is working to get ads on TV, and we need $500,000 to do it. Will you help us raise the funds?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191211_CB_20191211-fr-CB-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Booker HQ
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191211_CB_20191211-fr-CB-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c32/5fca0d19/7832ace2/291c82d7/1354495907/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c32/5fca0d19/7832ace2/291c82d6/1354495907/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c32/5fca0d19/7832ace2/291c82d5/1354495907/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c32/5fca0d19/7832ace2/291c82d4/1354495907/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c32/5fca0d19/7832ace2/291c82d3/1354495907/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c32/5fca0d19/7832ace2/291c82d7/1354495907/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Quote of the day: The hoax that started it all
body:
Moment by moment, the truth about corruption in Washington is coming out. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c1464e9f1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 11, 2019
---
| | |
# **Quote of the day: The hoax that started it all**

**Moment by moment** , the truth about corruption in Washington is coming out.

**In a Senate hearing today** , Michael Horowitz—Inspector General of the Justice Department—delivered a scathing blow to the narrative pushed by Democrats and their media allies about the FBI’s surveillance of the Trump campaign during the 2016 election.

**The Beltway media’s** initial reaction to the report was predictable. Pundits cherry picked the parts they liked, while ignoring _17 separate falsehoods and omissions_ found across three surveillance applications used to justify the FBI monitoring a former Trump campaign adviser.

**Fortunately, the truth** often finds a way of coming to light. In today’s hearing, Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-SC) asked the tough, obvious questions that most reporters didn’t.

**"Former FBI Director** James Comey said this week that your report vindicates him. Is that a fair assessment?" Sen. Graham asked Horowitz.

**His reply:** “I think the activities we found here don't vindicate anybody who touched this.”

[_Rolling Stone_ : Horowitz report shows “years of breathless headlines were wrong.” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1c90fd198&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [CNN grilled for refusing to cover opening statements in Horowitz testimony](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa77d699de&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **A huge win for peace through strength!**

**Americans finally got** some good news from Congress this week. In addition to an upcoming vote on USMCA, legislators have agreed to terms for the 2020 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), which will fund our great American military.

**All of President Trump’s top priorities** were agreed to in the final deal, including:
* The biggest pay raise for our troops _in a decade_

* More funding to restore our military preparedness

* More resources to secure our border

* Paid parental leave to take care of our military families

* Establishing the cutting-edge United States Space Force

**After far too much obstruction** from Congress this year, President Trump wants to close out 2019 with huge wins for working Americans. That includes this historic deal to fully fund our troops. Congress shouldn’t wait any longer to send it to his desk.

[Something to share: President Trump is ready to sign the NDAA!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1dc7a3ee6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: The Swamp can’t take credit for President Trump’s work**

**Decades ago,** as a private citizen, President Trump saw that Americans were being treated unfairly by NAFTA. So he ran for office—and won—on a promise to replace it.

**Now, right on cue** , Democrat career politicians are trying to claim credit for President Trump’s work. The reality is that he negotiated a new deal, the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA), and then House Democrats let it languish in Congress for more than a year. Finally, under pressure, Speaker Nancy Pelosi has at last agreed to bring the new deal to a vote.

**That’s great news** for American workers, and it should’ve happened long ago. After years of broken promises by Washington to fix NAFTA, it took President Trump to get it done.

[Watch: Promises Made, Promises Kept!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=760084b174&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Donald J. Trump talks to members of the press on the South Lawn of the White House** | December 10, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9462c6661d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9965664420&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ee9874859b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I am going to ask you to make a contribution toward our campaign's FEC fundraising goal. My hope is that you'll give me a quick minute to explain why this request is so important.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191211-lme?refcode=em191211-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

In a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a contribution toward our campaign's FEC fundraising goal. My hope is that you'll give me a quick minute to explain why this request is so important.

At the end of the month, my team will file our fundraising numbers with the FEC for the very last time this year. It's our best chance to show our GOP opponent, Jason Lewis, and right-wing special interests that we have what it takes to win re-election next year.

But while I've been focused on doing my job in the Senate -- from tackling the climate crisis to defending our health care against this administration's attacks -- outside groups have set their sights on our race and consider me a top target in 2020.

For the sake of our state, our country, and our chance to take back the Senate, we can't let them have their way. Too much is at stake to sit this election out. And in the face of so much money from special interests that is already pouring in to replace me, the only way we can fight back and win is through a groundswell of grassroots support.

**With that in mind, and with just a short time left until the year is out, I'm counting on you to step up and support our campaign so I can keep fighting for you in the Senate. Will you make a contribution today to help us hit our last FEC fundraising goal of the year?** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191211-lme?refcode=em191211-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191211-lme?refcode=em191211-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")

| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191211-lme?refcode=em191211-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191211-lme?refcode=em191211-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Your contributions have made the difference time and again and allow me to spend more time talking with Minnesota voters and doing my job in the Senate. That's a gift I know I am lucky to have.

Thank you.

-- Tina

But while I've been focused on doing my job in the Senate -- from tackling the climate crisis to defending our health care against this administration's attacks -- outside groups have set their sights on our race and consider me a top target in 2020. For the sake of our state, our country, and our chance to take back the Senate, we can't let them have their way. Too much is at stake to sit this election out. And in the face of so much money from special interests that is already pouring in to replace me, the only way we can fight back and win is through a groundswell of grassroots support. With that in mind, and with just a short time left until the year is out, I'm counting on you to step up and support our campaign so I can keep fighting for you in the Senate. Will you make a contribution today to help us hit our last FEC fundraising goal of the year? If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Your contributions have made the difference time and again and allow me to spend more time talking with Minnesota voters and doing my job in the Senate. That's a gift I know I am lucky to have. Thank you. -- Tina

name: Steve Chabot
subject: They're Really Going to Impeach the President
body:
A National Travesty No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Impeaching the President - They're Really Going to Do It](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-j/)
Democrats in Congress have been calling for President Trump's impeachment since the day he was inaugurated. In the next few days, the Democrat-led House will presumably vote for impeachment. In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming impeachment vote in the House, how the Senate will likely vote, and how this whole process is doing irreparable harm to our nation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Impeachment Sham is now Back in the Judiciary Committee](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-d/)
Today the impeachment circus returns to the Judiciary Committee, on which I've served for more than two decades. In this week's blog, I discuss the latest act in the democrats' impeachment circus and how I will use my time in the committee to expose how this inquiry is dividing our country and wasting millions in taxpayer dollars. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [So, Any Chance Michael Bloomberg's Going to be Our Next President?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-u/)
Michael Bloomberg is a very successful businessman, and later served three consecutive terms as Mayor of New York City. Most would argue that he had a pretty successful run at both, although he has now refuted, and apologized for, some of his signature policies, like stop and frisk. Now he wants to be our president. This week I write about Bloomberg's chances of winning and how he will spend a fortune trying. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [So How's the Impeachment Going?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats impeachment process is a flawed and biased charade. In this week's blog, I discuss how the impeachment proceedings are going and how they differ from the last successful presidential impeachment, Bill Clinton in 1998. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdutiidd-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: What’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

In 2015, leaders from around the world came together to address a looming public health, environmental, and national security catastrophe and agreed on the most comprehensive, global response. What we’re talking about is climate change.

Two years later, President Donald Trump withdrew our country from this response -- the Paris Climate Agreement -- for no legitimate reason.

This agreement benefits everyone on our planet, especially us in Iowa. But Donald Trump listened to fossil fuel executives over the will of the American people.

Despite the conclusive research on the effects of climate change, Steve King continues to deny its harmful effects.

**[If you agree that there’s no time like the present to change the course of history, sign our petition demanding the United States rejoin the Paris Climate Agreement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12788427/131993538/2136888502?mscode=em19_191212_parisclimatept&refcode=em19_191212_parisclimatept&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWNhYjU0Ni1mYjFjLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP210EWGJexdqTROzjnUGp5Ay9nOCBmcGN86DWETxfs=&emci=c4f836bc-5c1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ecab546-fb1c-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12788428/131993539/2136888502?mscode=em19_191212_parisclimatept&refcode=em19_191212_parisclimatept&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWNhYjU0Ni1mYjFjLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP210EWGJexdqTROzjnUGp5Ay9nOCBmcGN86DWETxfs=&emci=c4f836bc-5c1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ecab546-fb1c-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
Steve King is blind to the effects of climate change in our district.

Here’s just a small fraction of what’s going on:
* We've seen record rainfall that has washed away topsoil and crops. Unprecedented rain has soaked beans in storage until they expand so much they bust through and destroy bins, leaving the crop compromised.
* In Lehigh (pop. 401) in Webster County, the Des Moines River caused over 96 days of flooding, and the river rose 6 feet in 15 minutes last winter.
* This year, a late harvest and a wet and cold fall meant that only 43% of corn was harvested by the beginning of November.

This is just the tip of the iceberg. We’ll face more extreme, more expensive, and more frequent challenges.

And worst of all -- what we don’t fix now will make our children’s future bleak. I am where I am today because my parents and grandparents left me with opportunities. We must do the same for our children. **I have always believed that we aren’t inheriting the land from our parents, we’re borrowing it from our children.**

**[Sign our petition today: tell Donald Trump to re-enter the Paris Climate Agreement. The cost of staying out is too great to bear.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12788429/131993540/2136888502?mscode=em19_191212_parisclimatept&refcode=em19_191212_parisclimatep&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWNhYjU0Ni1mYjFjLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP210EWGJexdqTROzjnUGp5Ay9nOCBmcGN86DWETxfs=&emci=c4f836bc-5c1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ecab546-fb1c-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12788430/131993541/2136888502?mscode=em19_191212_parisclimatept&refcode=em19_191212_parisclimatept&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWNhYjU0Ni1mYjFjLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP210EWGJexdqTROzjnUGp5Ay9nOCBmcGN86DWETxfs=&emci=c4f836bc-5c1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ecab546-fb1c-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) Standing Tall for All,

\-- J.D.

clean_body: Peter -- In 2015, leaders from around the world came together to address a looming public health, environmental, and national security catastrophe and agreed on the most comprehensive, global response. What we’re talking about is climate change. Two years later, President Donald Trump withdrew our country from this response -- the Paris Climate Agreement -- for no legitimate reason. This agreement benefits everyone on our planet, especially us in Iowa. But Donald Trump listened to fossil fuel executives over the will of the American people. Despite the conclusive research on the effects of climate change, Steve King continues to deny its harmful effects. Steve King is blind to the effects of climate change in our district. Here’s just a small fraction of what’s going on: We've seen record rainfall that has washed away topsoil and crops. Unprecedented rain has soaked beans in storage until they expand so much they bust through and destroy bins, leaving the crop compromised. In Lehigh (pop. 401) in Webster County, the Des Moines River caused over 96 days of flooding, and the river rose 6 feet in 15 minutes last winter. This year, a late harvest and a wet and cold fall meant that only 43% of corn was harvested by the beginning of November. This is just the tip of the iceberg. We’ll face more extreme, more expensive, and more frequent challenges. And worst of all -- what we don’t fix now will make our children’s future bleak. I am where I am today because my parents and grandparents left me with opportunities. We must do the same for our children. I have always believed that we aren’t inheriting the land from our parents, we’re borrowing it from our children. ** Standing Tall for All, \-- J.D. =

[**SIGN ON: Demand the U.S. stay in the Paris Climate Agreement! ⇨**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tLMIm_FyHb9yOJYlK61GIKBzVdRrE0mHdVR--P_geJQ=/jUOJLOu0PGzMKtZ-sI6bysC_5fH0lnp1sCJCxMdl-m8=) **Wow, I 'm sad to say, it's really happening. Recently, the Trump administration formally notified the United Nations that the president is withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement.** The Paris Climate Agreement is a multilateral commitment to reducing global carbon emissions in order to alleviate some of the worst consequences of climate change. Of the nearly 200 countries who have signed on, only one has announced its withdrawal: the United States. [**Now, it 's on us to stand together and fight back. So, will you add your name and join me in demanding Trump to reverse his decision?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tLMIm_FyHb9yOJYlK61GIKBzVdRrE0mHdVR--P_geJQ=/jUOJLOu0PGzMKtZ-sI6bysC_5fH0lnp1sCJCxMdl-m8=) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/tLMIm_FyHb9yOJYlK61GIKBzVdRrE0mHdVR--P_geJQ=/jUOJLOu0PGzMKtZ-sI6bysC_5fH0lnp1sCJCxMdl-m8=)**
---
**As a former Foreign Service Officer, I know the dire consequences of turning back on our allies and international promises.** As one of the planet's biggest emitters of greenhouse gases, the U.S. should be taking a leadership role in addressing climate change -- not ignoring the problem entirely.
**The world can 't afford for us to go back on our commitments. But Trump will only listen if we make a BIG splash. [That means if you're reading this we need you to sign on now and join me in supporting our commitment to the Paris Climate Agreement.](https://act.myngp.com/el/tLMIm_FyHb9yOJYlK61GIKBzVdRrE0mHdVR--P_geJQ=/jUOJLOu0PGzMKtZ-sI6bysC_5fH0lnp1sCJCxMdl-m8=)**

subject: Here's what our campaign has been up to recently.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
We've been working hard to earn your vote.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/9789b54c45ff/calling-all-patriots-12089053?e=795c6d9796)
https://secure.anedot.com/janet-barresi-for-congress/c1330008baaba59e9d792
See More Photos (http://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK)
https://secure.anedot.com/janet-barresi-for-congress/c1330008baaba59e9d792

** Peter,
------------------------------------------------------------
Ever since we announced our campaign to take back Oklahoma's 5th District and the entire U.S. House for conservatives we have been criss-crossing the district and meeting voters. I wanted to share with you just a sampling of some of the events we've been to.
https://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK/posts/115304689877667?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARDQH_sq2GRlUGTasj7I0OTrdGgCUQ45X9vpyRl2EqYQ26wba1ThbZeZgFX1EqR6GIrcaVLwYqcdmFQ5kmHDhzT5ZGnfJLA7IZ799hb13CDu1VIaoKuzBIaZouAd5wCX2Af8T9WrWZgy3fMmG6qygVuhzhamzKG1hrTyP0mcjvCxsgNIsAllTFQbujRKaRLbkrVFkzKkHoPm9E90BTnRa5eE1ufHQiAxYCk3IATuB9A8DGJVbUn5A9n7E_T9ohuU3r2xrYmUsginHBCUBtGOfsnJ1Gu0_r95W7tlXTcERrE5JyV6QeGINm8-uzI2tuEBqsxqj94eXP2KLUVOsTF7EqA&__tn__=-R

I was recently blessed to be able to attend the 26th Annual CBMC Oklahoma - Christian Business Men's Connection Salt & Light Awards Banquet at the National Cowboy & Western Heritage Museum.

This year's award recipient, Dr. John D. Fozard, president of Mid-America Christian University, gave a truly inspirational acceptance speech, all about trusting God even in the hardest of times, and about the eternal value of discipling others. It was wonderful to see long-time acquaintances and make new friends.
https://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK/posts/140718134002989?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARBeZOC-0zwTF4xXLH-kUlEejNnG4n5dhb64SK_E_jNNMxApbKEZJ7JootyaZmiQ7hKLJKMlELIS8xNcwH5TrpKQ0EiZIMvUngTHuNLEyjAOe_AxMR8cXmzQF4YiJVDSyfY_Ut7wciMQehnJhBHJMHvcxx7zhmvzoIwyG0M1kW7-NnoC1LiV7nINnYeot5ETziPXuZm9Y0AYKRGMtesza4n3tSizTCqrTYo39RhETCIeCavg96VJDNK0ghCj_3uU3LK27es0gkSEWBD9Hd-3geAdGmVgKNjWvZp_VnBSDThE8v1QUQ7s_FfL8VkARVGuEeyaU_jZIg7Ptm0-LIQZDxI&__tn__=-R

Flipping Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District back to red again is one of the biggest fights Oklahoma Republicans will face in 2020. I was recently honored to speak to the Oklahoma Republican Party's chili cook-off where I also snuck in some of my homemade cookies for all of the fantastic activists of the OKGOP.
https://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK/posts/144864296921706?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARDntB6mm_8Ny4jatc2sHiRcSd267cBWLYWLzQCqkF7ZRmG0sD4t_vmKEy2i8t7FPcNaCvBHKccQlUo3XNd6k_PjBbbJVfUZjxnAimZIvF4GEYYvhOGvZqlSE74tRnqjcwr3q0h2AytDS3TdZNbOw38vqM-0B4UKDT-nKsDg2icPIFgis-dpGFRzBdxWqmeiDCqzKOWOTnxgd9T6B8CgTj0XHyyFovQX2gQFRv-xGdWrHebShorhGYf-Z8nbXP_w6s4Sm4t4gF20KU-NpuslCZC1thOoFK0axm3PNwTaWnpPBfQVbcDMBnO8io3YtFJ-UEZIkVZp-F7cOKdCoyT272o&__tn__=-R

I had a great time attending and speaking to the members of the Association of Oklahoma General Contractors last month. They create thousands of good-paying jobs for Oklahomans and keep our economy booming.
https://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK/posts/151154019626067?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARC7hA-tqvq_mzgAPtjrI_IKWRApQVR4m3iaIkCMrh0THish0wn9if9HAmpIl4VK18QB58YfOjZft34hoKbsZ8mujZcMQ-OWgmKtz_nGhEzzpUgWKTjmrpoMP29CLi3AdQWkpyl-kArGkyZvBZIXTdrW3WXxOPewCfssWl5_hTYq73BFPymqIpxmhKiIxI-22i2dRjrlo1egXj7rvUTwhl0Fat4sV91BwBj0zBT-EuwstQccuxjzaHP0SNeVWOgXaXgiygBRtSyhg_Yd3oBxqKfyGHp2IsfzOFuDKeW8FvvDbHboyZ1edkM6dMUr6dDkKJboLtCKxw3VHkya1nfweJs&__tn__=-R

We took a yard sign and a truck to the Shawnee Christmas parade just a few days ago and had a blast meeting voters and interacting with the community. It's events like the parade that make our district such a joyous place to live.
https://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK/posts/152372356170900?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARBKGzikomx8fYdPUVICuqvlcD-JqX8TmujngLG_dbhx1MCdVnjWaMUF6e1PyWN9hdNDPEs5ZuY8qF7JvWxODx-U8zd_O82yIihyRNP-sbqPUTwrHgxIWhubFi2HUrLk2MnDltFT7JCDSoO2YcuGmuxnby1QQuIxEh_85ALfqlPlJS5zmAl4_YzVpLUMOtjMuGwHM0PJDwjfhmikhuAzr0GSvlw6rzy2GBxwDCP719m8kb3Nmg-JxXXAghkZ65XHfH1b8a0jTofoc3gziZbZCOppi0bWxLNQmyepAoEulqIF4_PkxAsDH2OJMwp9WltDBDN5B6wg1jvQQRXIWnoSZ1Q&__tn__=-R

And just this weekend we had an amazing time meeting voters at the Stockyards. Christmas cheer is definitely in the air.
https://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK/photos/a.115304683211001/145359943538808/?type=3&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARDZ3BzF5Xv6sDzGb4fM9OsUzwUoSLWV9hVaHu1gLWVr_5458IlvxSVgqXUXiOJ-68Feybhaf3p-hMkDOtuawu_pjYJpTXkd_aCSqezZSaYNr47R-sgUchFEenzHgiFOPOsnJ3FmI09Ct7q0L3LmIkxWoizzR3RQarwXeMMoyHSjF3Pr5jvnudqGFUlgfNNaB5fuiJZJOGKMbPEFCsoeaBxb0VxuesTdfE7vUfRf--IOpzsfAyqXiAo_0Dnb8QkZdhgSWFNHGQJJzYJcwrSo0qulg3h-_EnvRiYXpCVDBlxbZBf76QL4a36QZitGmOhljXyaz580kGQK62YnGFxMvto&__tn__=-R

We have been taking occasional breaks from campaigning to leave time for other priorities of course. I recently put on a Turkey Bingo night for my church and all the proceeds went to fund a mission trip to Peru!
https://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK/posts/147967929944676?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARAIKmL-4kiyXme95v3POHlBfpH86ByvyHkavBpsHdBcTDrImkr0-8qYI08VuOKp4StgHAU0s-TUEl-s3sF_tIbQzdn70NRTKF5PcArx-zny19U8Ft-lPRkAQiZJ5id-bhqzPeVAAR7xNAXL9URnr0f51qDm_WjucgNdgXnQMqvln3YYWJIlX6wqPJ-fRLO-Fz3OEvwHhpv9MBGk6nXmAyCxNEdONu6_6sNH4uRm-FA4gWOtKeV4h-qmcdkHBucqaVTPWyvQj0Og83AT2vBTEQBJ05n39OPcq-2sUS8v1f51jmu31M44lHLdS4i7xcLl3khpGH_Os8E00nTWZfSYSGE&__tn__=-R

And of course Thanksgiving was a huge event for our family. I'm thankful for so many of God's blessings and hope you had the opportunity to spend time with loved ones as well. Christmas is just around the corner!
See More Photos (http://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK)
I want to thank you for all of the support we have received since we entered this race just a few weeks ago. We are working tirelessly to make sure we meet every voter we can and spread the word about our campaign to take Oklahoma values to Washington. Please give us a follow on Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/JanetBarresiOK) to see updates from the trail as soon as we post them!

We can beat Kendra Horn in 2020 if grassroots patriots across the district team up to get the job done. Please consider donating just $5 to help power our campaign and fight. Thank you. (https://secure.anedot.com/janet-barresi-for-congress/c1330008baaba59e9d792)

For Oklahoma
https://secure.anedot.com/janet-barresi-for-congress/c1330008baaba59e9d792
- Janet Baressi

| | Hi Peter, The Trump Administration has begun the year-long process of withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement \-- the international treaty to reduce emissions contributing to the climate crisis. As a mother of two young kids, climate change is deeply personal to me. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m collecting signatures to demand the Trump administration keep the United States in the Paris Climate Agreement because the impacts of climate change are undeniable. We owe it to our kids and their futures to do everything in our power to mitigate the most pressing issue facing our planet. | Democrats Trying to Take Credit for Governor Sununu's Good Work!!
---

| | |

name: Team Collins
subject: Sara Gideon’s Dark Money Allies Launch “Massive Ad Buy” Attacking Senator Collins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
According to a report in Politico, Sara Gideon's dark money allies are spending more than a half million dollars over the next three weeks on a negative television ad attacking Senator Susan Collins.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_
**Sara Gideon 's Dark Money Allies Launch "Massive Ad Buy" Attacking Senator Collins**
According to a report in [_Politico_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0), Sara Gideon's dark money allies are spending more than a half million dollars over the next three weeks on a negative television ad attacking Senator Susan Collins. The group known as "Maine Momentum" is the same one that has already been discredited by the [_Washington Post 's_ non-partisan fact checker](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) for having a history of making false claims, and it continues to refuse to disclose who is funding this shadowy organization.
This most recent attack claims that tax reform, which passed two years ago, "didn't do anything for average Mainers." But we want you to know the truth.
**HERE ARE THE FACTS:**
* Nearly nine out of 10 Maine families who owe federal income taxes received a tax cut.
* On average, Maine families saw a tax cut of 12 percent, or $734. An additional 12,000 Maine families will not owe federal income tax because of tax reform.
* The average Maine taxpayer earning between $50,000-$75,000 received a tax cut of $1,400.
* A Maine family with $24,000 in income now pays no income tax to the federal government.
* Instead of paying money to Washington, a single mother with one child earning $35,000 will receive, on average, more than $1,100 from the federal government to help her make ends meet.
* A Maine couple with two children earning $60,000 will get a tax cut of $1,700 - a cut of more than 100 percent!

Don't just take it from us. Here's what some Maine job creators are saying about how tax cuts have helped them grow their businesses, and how the savings helped the dedicated men and women who work there keep more of their hard-earned money in their own pockets!
[**Hancock Lumber**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) in Casco, with more than 500 employees, used savings received from the tax cuts to increase its workers' wages, increase its contributions to its employees' 401k accounts, increase holiday bonuses, and pay for 100% of annual health insurance increases. "We've invested 100 percent of that [tax cuts] back into the business... most importantly, this isn't a one-time boost. Tax reform's benefits will show up every single year in the future. Simply put, any time a good company is able to keep more of its own money, good things happen." -_**Kevin Hancock, President of Hancock Lumber.**_ [_Aug. 20, 2019 NAM Shopfloor Blog_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**New Balance**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0), which employs more than 900 people who make athletic shoes at three manufacturing facilities in Skowhegan, Norridgewock, and Norway, says "companies like New Balance, which already has a strong domestic manufacturing presence, will be able to increase investments in their facilities and be more globally competitive while remaining a U.S. company hiring U.S. workers."
[**Pottle 's Transportation**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) in Hermon bought 25 new tractors and 25 new trailers. "Before the tax bill, we were planning on trading in trucks, but now we would like to grow our fleet because we think our customers will also benefit and be busier too." -_**Barry Pottle, President and CEO, Pottle 's Transportation**_ [_Feb. 12 2018, Transport Topics article excerpt_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**Windham Millwork**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) in Windham, with more than 100 employees, invested in the company and its workers. "[Tax reform] means Windham Millwork will have more money to spend on what matters - our workers and community. With the money we'll save, we can create new jobs or offer better pay for our workforce." [_-Bruce Pulkkinen, owner of Windham Millwork._](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**IDEXX Laboratories Inc.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) in Westbrook, which employs about 7,000 people, says it increased 401k contributions to help employees save more for retirement as a result of financial benefits from tax reform, and decided to expand in Maine rather than overseas. [_MaineBiz February 2, 2018_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**Camden National Bank**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) in Camden, which employs more than 600 people, raised employee salaries and provided bonuses to its workers as a result of tax reform. [_Jan. 11, 2018 Portland Press Herald article excerpt_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**Everett J. Prescott Inc.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) in Gardiner says all 300 of its employees would receive a bonus following tax reform. [_March 5 2018, WABI article excerpt_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
The list of employers in Maine who were able to raise their employees' salaries, provide bonuses, reinvest to grow their companies, or all of the above goes on and on and on...
Senator Collins also secured a number of important changes in the tax bill that helped Maine families. According to the [_Wall Street Journal,_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) "the biggest-ticket item" she secured "was her battle to preserve a property-tax deduction of up to $10,000." This is often the largest deduction taken by Mainers, who have the 11th highest per capita property tax burden in the nation.
The anonymous people behind this latest false attack ad are willing to spend millions of dollars to try and fool you, but the bottom line is this:
Susan Collins believes **YOU** deserve to keep your hard-earned money in your own pocket - **NOT** send it to Washington, D.C.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
_****_
[
SusanCollins.com
](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Collins for Senator
---

Click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=41315526&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Collins for Senator.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDEzMTU1MjYS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY2MTEwMjM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Nick Meier
subject: We’re in this race to win, but we can’t beat Crenshaw’s corporate donors without a lot of small dollar investments

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Stories the media isn’t covering - Christians have to know about
body:
Peter,
The impeachment circus in D.C. continues to consume almost all of the media’s coverage, yet there are actually far more important headlines that should give pause to anyone who cares about protecting life.
**The radical abortion movement experienced a recent court victory** seeking to punish the undercover reporter who exposed Planned Parenthood’s barbaric practices of selling aborted baby body parts. The judge ruled there is sufficient evidence to send the case to trial by jury.
**Pennsylvania’s Democrat Gov. Tom Wolf vetoed a bill barring the abortion of babies** just because they have Down syndrome, or as that used to be called, eugenics.
**California’s Supreme Court refused to hear an appeal** from a Catholic missionary organization of a state law forcing them to provide coverage for elective abortions under their health insurance.
**New York just passed another pro-abortion law** that includes forcing all employers to distribute information on how to obtain abortions with no exemptions for religious organizations that oppose abortion.
I don’t list all these stories to depress you, but to show the urgency of redoubling our efforts at fighting back against this relentless campaign to normalize the culture of death and paint abortion as a moral “good.”
**[The way we stop these evil policies is to stop those elected and appointed officials who made them. The way we stop them is for all 90 million Christians in America to vote in 2020](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191212apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191212apl01nda&n=1).**
Their campaign to call good evil and evil good starts with removing God and the Bible from public discourse, so there is no absolute moral authority. They want government to replace all other authority. Don’t believe it’s really happening?
Consider how several candidates for president recently expressed support for population control measures through abortion access. When China justified population control measures as a “moral good,” they set off an unspeakable genocide that slaughtered millions of baby girls in the womb.
And consider how California recently passed a resolution condemning pastors for teaching what the Bible says about human sexuality. The government of California has taken a dangerous step in declaring what a church can and cannot teach.
**Christians cannot stand idly by and allow God to be forced out of the public square, or our most sacred values of life and religious freedom to be taken away.**
Yet, that’s exactly what will happen if believers don’t wake up, roll-up their sleeves and get involved.
You’ve heard me say it many times before; an estimated 25 million believers will fail to go to the polls unless we equip them to vote.
We need your help to make this happen. We have a goal to mobilize one-million new voters, but for this to become a reality, we need to hit our monthly fundraising markers between now and November 2020.
[Will you please consider donating to My Faith Votes today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191212apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191212apl01nda&n=2)?
An investment to protect religious freedom and the sanctity of life is one of the best decisions you can make. It’s likely these threats won’t endanger our generation, but if our country continues on this course, it will be a reality for our children.
Thank you for your continued faithful support.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191212apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191212apl01nda&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191212apl01nda&n=4)
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191212apl01nda&n=5).

We hope you’ll take the time to read Eugene’s message, but if you don’t have time and would still like to contribute,**[you can do so here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12796697/132061903/554177247?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.12_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM1MDUzNi0xNjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FfJF0W0L1DQr82s2Vd_fr6ncZSpIh_GidFjHU8jfVtY=)**_
Friend,

Today, the House of Representatives passed historic legislation aimed at lowering the price of prescription drugs in this country. This is a great step forward, friend.

But despite the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office concluding that this bill would in fact lower the price of prescription drugs and save taxpayers hundreds of billions of dollars, **my opponent Scott Perry did what he always does: Bent to the will of special interests and voted against legislation that would actually help people here in South Central PA.**

_Frankly, I’m tired of it._ Seniors and hard-working families deserve better than what they’re getting from Scott Perry. As your representative, I will always put the interests of my constituents first, and I’m more fired up than ever to flip this seat blue and restore real leadership to our community.

I wanted to make sure I came to you personally to ask you to chip in to our campaign because this issue is one of my top priorities. Special interest groups know they have a reliable vote in Scott Perry, so we can be sure they’re going to pour millions of dollars into this race to save him.

**[That’s why your support is so important, friend. This campaign is powered by real, hard-working people, and we won’t have special interests to bail us out if we can’t afford the resources we need to win. Can you chip in to our campaign so we can flip PA-10 blue and continue this important work to lower the cost of prescription drugs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12796698/132061904/554177247?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.12_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM1MDUzNi0xNjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FfJF0W0L1DQr82s2Vd_fr6ncZSpIh_GidFjHU8jfVtY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Express donate $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12796699/132061905/480453248?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2019.12.12_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM1MDUzNi0xNjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FfJF0W0L1DQr82s2Vd_fr6ncZSpIh_GidFjHU8jfVtY=)

If we're going to give Tennesseeans the leadership we need, we've got to hit each and every fundraising goal to keep up with Hagerty's campaign.
Hagerty has the full support of Washington elites -- we don't.
[_**I 'm not taking a penny from corporate pacs or special interests, so we need to mobilize the strength of this entire grassroots team. If you can, chip in today. Any amount helps a lot.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1d8/18d6a294/4cd7cbed/26d631b3/4205995045/VEsB/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191211a?refcode=jme191211a_nd&amount=5&recurring=1")

After the deadline, our numbers will go public for all to see, and Hagerty will be watching. And after the deadline, it will officially be an election year.
[_**We need to buckle down and show him what he 's up against. Will you chip in?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1d8/18d6a294/4cd7cbed/26d631b3/4205995045/VEsO/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191211a?refcode=jme191211a_nd&amount=5&recurring=1")

name: Team WF
subject: Fwd: Tim isn’t sitting quietly on the sidelines.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi there, Take it from Senator Klobuchar, Governor Walz has never been one to sit quietly on the sidelines. He's doing everything he can to counter Trump's toxic, divisive rhetoric with our message of One Minnesota, which focuses on our strength in unity. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4gY6fXETIZVRpv3Q7CTBGshZa2imgsQMdlyQM9Hax7A=/dHKVhd99fkfm7CbagifHpDL49i2HkLFwXjW1ZyIJRbw=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi there,
Take it from Senator Klobuchar, Governor Walz has never been one to sit quietly on the sidelines.
He's doing everything he can to counter Trump's toxic, divisive rhetoric with our message of One Minnesota, which focuses on our strength in unity.
**It 's critical we finish 2019 strong so he can hit the ground running in the New Year and continue fighting for all of us. [Help us keep Minnesota blue. Make a contribution that works for you today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4gY6fXETIZVRpv3Q7CTBGshZa2imgsQMdlyQM9Hax7A=/dHKVhd99fkfm7CbagifHpDL49i2HkLFwXjW1ZyIJRbw=?refcode=body)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/4gY6fXETIZVRpv3Q7CTBGshZa2imgsQMdlyQM9Hax7A=/dHKVhd99fkfm7CbagifHpDL49i2HkLFwXjW1ZyIJRbw=?refcode=button&amount=25)**
Thank you,
Team Walz-Flanagan
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Amy Klobuchar
My friend,
I'm proud to call Tim Walz a friend. He has dedicated his life to public service -- as a teacher, veteran, member of Congress and now as our governor.
Tim leads with optimism and sees the best in people, but he isn't afraid to stand firm in his convictions. He always puts Minnesotans first and he follows through on this promise.
As President Trump continues to target Minnesota with his divisive message, Tim isn't sitting quietly on the sidelines. He's working hard to fight back.

name: Cory Booker
subject: An update on my campaign for president.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| **Team, I want you to hear this from me: I 'm in this race to win it, and our path forward is clear.** I may not be on the debate stage next Thursday, but thanks to the outpouring of support from this community over the past few weeks, we know there's a path to victory and we no longer need the December debate stage to get there. The voters deserve to decide who the Democratic nominee should be -- and I know that together, we can win this race. If I'm not on the debate stage next week, I'll be on the road hearing directly from and sharing my vision with the people who will determine the outcome of this race. I'll be doing what we've done for the last ten months of this campaign and throughout my time in public service -- meeting people where they are, in living rooms and church basements, at coffee shops and in diners, and discussing how to tackle the most pressing challenges we face. **Because the truth is that in America, we share a common pain, and to beat Trump and heal our country, we must unite with a sense of common purpose.** I've spent my entire career bringing people together to take on our toughest challenges. I beat slumlords who were taking advantage of low-income families, ushered in Newark's greatest economic growth in a generation in the wake of the Great Recession, and overcame the broken politics of Washington to get criminal justice reform passed into law. I'm building a campaign to win, and that begins with the Iowa caucuses on February 3rd. But I can't do this alone -- I need you with me if we are going to succeed. [**Can you rush a donation right now to make sure we 've got the strongest ground game going into the Iowa caucuses?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I know I say this a lot, but **beating Donald Trump is the floor, not the ceiling.** We need a leader in the Oval Office who's able to unite our deeply divided nation and begin the healing our country so desperately needs. It's time for a president who brings us together as one nation, not one who drives us apart with hate and fear. **If you give me the chance, I will be that president. It 's why I'm putting out this call to action: [Will you stand with me in this race?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This community has stuck with me when others have counted us out. This community is why we're still here now and why we'll be here for the long run. **For that, I 'm grateful.** I'm not sticking around for vanity or ego -- I'm in this to win it because I believe I'm the best candidate to beat Donald Trump and lead this country to higher ground. [**I hope you 're with me.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c3d/5fca0d19/78359b31/291c8189/1948954085/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c3d/5fca0d19/78359b31/291c8188/1948954085/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c3d/5fca0d19/78359b31/291c8197/1948954085/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c3d/5fca0d19/78359b31/291c8196/1948954085/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c3d/5fca0d19/78359b31/291c8195/1948954085/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c3d/5fca0d19/78359b31/291c8189/1948954085/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Karen Giorno
subject: Join Laura’s Text Message Army!
body:
When I ran President Trump's national voter outreach efforts in 2016, I learned the AMAZING things we could do with text messaging.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356435-831742-4754715-edb441dca8-11be216119)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356435-831742-4754715-edb441dca8-11be216119) This is Karen Giorno.

When I ran President Trump's national voter outreach efforts in 2016, I learned all about the AMAZING things we could do with text messaging.

As Laura Loomer's chief strategist for her congressional run, it's vital that we keep every line of communication open so [**I 'm asking you to join our "Text Message Army" today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356435-831742-4754715-edb441dca8-11be216119).

Due to ongoing bias and discrimination against conservatives and Republicans, **Laura REMAINS banned on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram**.

While other candidates can tweet out their thoughts and rally supporters through social media, Laura has to fight - AND PAY - for her ability to reach you.

A few times a week, Laura will text you and ask you to join in an effort that shouldn't take you more than a few seconds to perform.

She may ask you to send a tweet, post on Facebook, read and comment on an article, or even call your member of Congress.

**We 're not just running a campaign here, we're doing all we can to make an impact TODAY so Laura's future constituents can see that she's in this for them!**

[**Join today, and after you do, please help cover the costs of this program.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356435-831742-4754715-edb441dca8-11be216119) It's costing us $14 to send a text message to 1,000 people. Every dollar matters!

Laura's opponent, radical Democrat Lois Frankel can tweet her 30,000 followers **for nothing**. But not for Laura! [**Please join and help fund our costs today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356435-831742-4754715-edb441dca8-11be216119)

Thanks for taking the time to open and read this message and THANK YOU for your support for Laura.

Sincerely,

Karen Giorno
Chief Strategist
Laura Loomer for Congress

P.S. If you don't have Twitter like Laura, don't worry about it. [**Still sign up because we 're changing things up daily to keep them guessing.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356435-831742-4754715-edb441dca8-11be216119)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-356435-831742-84585d41bbe610b-11be216119)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: 2020 is LITERALLY right around the corner
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Dear Peter,

Before we break for the year, we want to make sure and wish all of you a happy and joyous holiday season. However you celebrate these special and holy days, we hope yours are filled with family, friends, and festive fun.

2020 is just a few moments away. and we can't wait. The new year brings with it new opportunities to win elections at every level of government and continue our work to build a statewide, county-based organizational structure that will have lasting impact on the electoral landscape of Tennessee.

We're glad you're with us on this journey and we look forward to all the good work we will do together next year.

All the best to you and yours,

Mary, Kris, Maria, Evan & Sandra
Your Tennessee Democratic Party

DECEMBER 19: A SPECIAL ELECTION FOR TN STATE HOUSE 77 & YOU CAN HELP

Next Thursday, December 19, voters in Tennessee State House District 77 (Dyer, Lake, and part of Obion County) will go to the polls in a special election to fill a vacant seat.

Democratic candidate Mike Smith is ready to fight for the voters of District 77 because he believes the rural way of life is worth fighting for. He believes that the people of West Tennessee have a right to their roots, a quality public education, and affordable healthcare.

Mike Smith knows that it's time beyond time for a state rep in West Tennessee who will listen more than he talks and will work across the aisle to solve problems instead of always blaming others. Mike will never engage in bullying or name calling, but instead will spend his time addressing the challenges that face West Tennessee.

This special election is all about turnout and it will take many conversations with voters to let voters know when and where they can vote. You can help! The TNDP has set up a virtual phone bank so that you can help to GET OUT THE VOTE from anywhere in the state (or the country!).

It's so easy. Virtual Phone Bank instructions can be found here [https://s3.amazonaws.com/collective-agency-wp-uploads/wp-content/uploads/sites/5/2019/11/HD77-Virtual-Phone-Bank-Document.pdf] . Access the virtual phone bank here [https://www.openvpb.com/vpb_bycode/F80823P-635276] .

If you are interested in canvassing and phone banking in the district or would like to make a donation, contact campaign manager: Deane Arganbright at argandeane@yahoo.com [argandeane@yahoo.com] or 731-588-0681.

UPDATE FROM THE DNC
A couple of weeks ago we told you about the DNC Unity Program, a new initiative to ensure Democrats enter the general election unified behind our eventual nominee and ready to defeat Trump in 2020. This week we received another memo highlighting additional work that the DNC are working on now to help state parties like the TNDP lay the groundwork for 2020 elections:

Data and Technology. The DNC has rebuilt their data infrastructure with a state-of-the-art, cloud-based data warehouse. They also continue to invest in the data itself to make sure our view of every voter and possible voter is accurate as possible with correct information like addresses and phone numbers, as well as integrating advanced data sets like demographic and behavioral modeling. They've modernized cybersecurity infrastructure to improve their own security posture, while helping state parties and campaigns do the same.

War Room. The DNC’s War Room is a rapid response operation with significant communications, research and digital components, staffed by dozens of operatives -- the majority of whom are veterans of the 2016 campaign who have been tracking Trump for years -- who work with hundreds of media outlets, surrogates, and online influencers to shape the narrative of the Trump presidency using reporter outreach, research, extremely localized content and disruptive online content, along with placing major stories about his record.

Research. The DNC is home to the largest and most experienced research team in Democratic politics who have been tracking Trump since 2015. They’ve built the world’s most comprehensive research file on Donald Trump - including “more than 7,000 lawsuits, volumes of Freedom of Information Act requests and thousands of hours of video footage.” This work began in 2015 and has continued without pause since the 2016 election.

Voter Protection. The DNC is building a voter protection infrastructure to protect Americans’ right to participate in a fair election-- including funding voter protection positions in battleground states, a national voter resource hub, and voter assistance hotline, as well as education, advocacy and organizing resources.

The bottom line: Democrats are preparing now to win in 2020.

TENNESSEE: YOU ARE NOT FREE IF YOU'RE NOT HEALTHY

"That all power is inherent in the people, and all free governments are founded on their authority, and instituted for their peace, safety, and happiness..." The Constitution of the State of Tennessee

Even though the public comments were overwhelming against medicaid block grants and studies show that they will not expand health care coverage and will, in fact, lead to deep cuts to children’s coverage and access [https://ccf.georgetown.edu/2019/07/17/new-study-finds-medicaid-per-capita-caps-and-block-grants-would-lead-to-deep-cuts-to-childrens-coverage-and-access/] , Republican Governor Bill Lee is moving forward with his plan anyway.

The expansion of Medicaid in other states comparable to Tennessee has proven that with it more people received coverage and rural hospitals are six times less likely too close [https://www.tnjustice.org/medicaid-block-grants-in-tennessee/] .

Yet, in a recent interview with Tennessee Holler, Governor Lee was asked how is rejecting $1 billion per year in Medicaid Expansion funds helping Tennessee's rural communities and the uninsured. His answer is basically, because I said so. WATCH HERE [http://tnholler.com/2019/12/video-gov-lee-defends-rejecting-1-billion-year-in-medicaid-funds/] .

Pardon us for allowing our skepticism to show when the leader of the political party that hates government and who defended the decision "to stockpile $732 million in federal anti-poverty funds reserved for families with children, saying the money would be put to use 'when the needs are there'" says "trust me."

WASHINGTON: DEMOCRATS ARE BUSY
In America, nobody is above the law - not even the president. Congress must be able to engage in investigations of serious abuses of the public trust.

Trump abused the power of the presidency. He used the official powers of his office to pressure a foreign country to interfere in our election on his behalf, risking our national security in the process. That is a violation of his constitutional oath and an impeachable offense.

Trump obstructed justice. He violated his constitutional oath by impeding a congressional investigation and keeping the American people in the dark. Trump directed a concerted and unprecedented defiance of lawful subpoenas, at which point impeachment is the only remedy.

Congress had a constitutional duty to act.

And because Democrats can multi-task, while Trump is tweeting, Democrats in the House have passed nearly 400 bills, including bills to lower health care costs and prescription drug prices, raise wages, improve gun safety, clean up corruption, safeguard our elections, and more.

Meanwhile, Republicans in the Senate have refused to take up most of these bills, and Trump doesn’t have a plan to address these issues.

Trump has broken his promises on everything from infrastructure to gun safety to drug prices and more.

ELECTION NEWS: 326 DAYS TO GO
The Cure for Democrats’ 2020 Terror: Voters who fear a Trump re-election can start rebuilding the blue wall now [https://www.nytimes.com/2019/11/08/opinion/2020-election-democrats.html]
"As much as people are obsessing over the primary, the work of donating and volunteering and showing up and getting involved - especially in state parties... is essential now,” said Wikler. “People often make panic donations in the last couple of weeks of a campaign. Certainly those donations are welcome, but at the end of a campaign all you can do is buy some more ads. If you make the panic donation a year out, it means that state parties and outside groups can hire more field organizers to train more volunteers to be able to reach out to more neighbors who might never get onto the get-out-the-vote lists unless the conversation starts months and months in advance.”
Marsha Blackburn Is Blocking Election-Security Bills & She's Proud of It [https://www.esquire.com/news-politics/politics/a29575436/marsha-blackburn-block-election-security-bill/]
"Sens. Mark Warner (D-Va.), Amy Klobuchar (D-Minn.) and Ron Wyden (D-Ore.) asked for unanimous consent to pass three election-related bills. But they were blocked by Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-Tenn.), who noted that the unsuccessful attempt was the latest by Democrats to pass election security bills in the Senate ahead of 2020."
Nearly 3,000 inactive voters purged from registration rolls in Williamson County [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/local/williamson/2019/12/09/inactive-voters-williamson-county-tennessee-voter-registration/4352776002/]
"Under state law, if a voter doesn't respond to a confirmation notice and then doesn't vote in the next two November elections, they'll be purged....'We purged a good many this year,' Gray said."

Thank you! Your contribution sustains our work to recruit and train excellent candidates, build out effective campaigns, build the infrastructure necessary to invest in and mobilize our county parties (our boots on the ground!), and win elections.
