clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Before we break for the year, we want to make sure and wish all of you a happy and joyous holiday season. However you celebrate these special and holy days, we hope yours are filled with family, friends, and festive fun. 2020 is just a few moments away. and we can't wait. The new year brings with it new opportunities to win elections at every level of government and continue our work to build a statewide, county-based organizational structure that will have lasting impact on the electoral landscape of Tennessee. We're glad you're with us on this journey and we look forward to all the good work we will do together next year. All the best to you and yours, Mary, Kris, Maria, Evan & Sandra Your Tennessee Democratic Party DECEMBER 19: A SPECIAL ELECTION FOR TN STATE HOUSE 77 & YOU CAN HELP Next Thursday, December 19, voters in Tennessee State House District 77 (Dyer, Lake, and part of Obion County) will go to the polls in a special election to fill a vacant seat. Democratic candidate Mike Smith is ready to fight for the voters of District 77 because he believes the rural way of life is worth fighting for. He believes that the people of West Tennessee have a right to their roots, a quality public education, and affordable healthcare. Mike Smith knows that it's time beyond time for a state rep in West Tennessee who will listen more than he talks and will work across the aisle to solve problems instead of always blaming others. Mike will never engage in bullying or name calling, but instead will spend his time addressing the challenges that face West Tennessee. This special election is all about turnout and it will take many conversations with voters to let voters know when and where they can vote. You can help! The TNDP has set up a virtual phone bank so that you can help to GET OUT THE VOTE from anywhere in the state (or the country!). It's so easy. Virtual Phone Bank instructions can be found here [] . Access the virtual phone bank here [] . If you are interested in canvassing and phone banking in the district or would like to make a donation, contact campaign manager: Deane Arganbright at argandeane@yahoo.com [argandeane@yahoo.com] or 731-588-0681. UPDATE FROM THE DNC A couple of weeks ago we told you about the DNC Unity Program, a new initiative to ensure Democrats enter the general election unified behind our eventual nominee and ready to defeat Trump in 2020. This week we received another memo highlighting additional work that the DNC are working on now to help state parties like the TNDP lay the groundwork for 2020 elections: Data and Technology. The DNC has rebuilt their data infrastructure with a state-of-the-art, cloud-based data warehouse. They also continue to invest in the data itself to make sure our view of every voter and possible voter is accurate as possible with correct information like addresses and phone numbers, as well as integrating advanced data sets like demographic and behavioral modeling. They've modernized cybersecurity infrastructure to improve their own security posture, while helping state parties and campaigns do the same. War Room. The DNC’s War Room is a rapid response operation with significant communications, research and digital components, staffed by dozens of operatives -- the majority of whom are veterans of the 2016 campaign who have been tracking Trump for years -- who work with hundreds of media outlets, surrogates, and online influencers to shape the narrative of the Trump presidency using reporter outreach, research, extremely localized content and disruptive online content, along with placing major stories about his record. Research. The DNC is home to the largest and most experienced research team in Democratic politics who have been tracking Trump since 2015. They’ve built the world’s most comprehensive research file on Donald Trump - including “more than 7,000 lawsuits, volumes of Freedom of Information Act requests and thousands of hours of video footage.” This work began in 2015 and has continued without pause since the 2016 election. Voter Protection. The DNC is building a voter protection infrastructure to protect Americans’ right to participate in a fair election-- including funding voter protection positions in battleground states, a national voter resource hub, and voter assistance hotline, as well as education, advocacy and organizing resources. The bottom line: Democrats are preparing now to win in 2020. TENNESSEE: YOU ARE NOT FREE IF YOU'RE NOT HEALTHY "That all power is inherent in the people, and all free governments are founded on their authority, and instituted for their peace, safety, and happiness..." The Constitution of the State of Tennessee Even though the public comments were overwhelming against medicaid block grants and studies show that they will not expand health care coverage and will, in fact, lead to deep cuts to children’s coverage and access [] , Republican Governor Bill Lee is moving forward with his plan anyway. The expansion of Medicaid in other states comparable to Tennessee has proven that with it more people received coverage and rural hospitals are six times less likely too close [] . Yet, in a recent interview with Tennessee Holler, Governor Lee was asked how is rejecting $1 billion per year in Medicaid Expansion funds helping Tennessee's rural communities and the uninsured. His answer is basically, because I said so. WATCH HERE [] . Pardon us for allowing our skepticism to show when the leader of the political party that hates government and who defended the decision "to stockpile $732 million in federal anti-poverty funds reserved for families with children, saying the money would be put to use 'when the needs are there'" says "trust me." WASHINGTON: DEMOCRATS ARE BUSY In America, nobody is above the law - not even the president. Congress must be able to engage in investigations of serious abuses of the public trust. Trump abused the power of the presidency. He used the official powers of his office to pressure a foreign country to interfere in our election on his behalf, risking our national security in the process. And while I don't want to bother you during the holidays, we can't afford to fall short. This is our first public FEC deadline since the impeachment hearings began, and our numbers will send a strong message to Steve Chabot that his blind loyalty to the president has serious consequences. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - The holidays are coming up -- and I hope everyone gets the chance to share quality time with loved ones. **But unfortunately our last huge fundraising deadline of the year is also fast approaching.** And while I don't want to bother you during the holidays, we can't afford to fall short. **This is our first public FEC deadline since the impeachment hearings began** , and our numbers will send a strong message to Steve Chabot that his blind loyalty to the president has serious consequences. There's a lot at stake here: our rule of law, our democracy, and our national security, to name a few. **It 's time to oust the people who aren't willing to protect those things.** But if we trail behind Chabot when numbers are reported in January, he'll know he got away with endangering our democracy for the sake of the president. Elise Stefanik's Democratic opponent raised $1 million after her stunt in the hearings, and Devin Nunes' Democratic opponent has raised $450 thousand since Nunes began pushing conspiracy theories to distract from Trump's wrongdoing.
Democrats are standing as a united front and telling Republicans that enough is enough --**let 's make sure Steve Chabot gets sent the same message.**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP is going after vulnerable Dems. We need your help to stop them!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- we'll keep this brief. The GOP is already in full attack mode going after vulnerable Democratic members of the House because they have the audacity to work for the people and hold the president accountable. They and their billions in dark, corporate super PAC money are already buying up ads and supporting far-right candidates ready to do Trump's every bidding. We're not going to sit idly by and let these attacks go unchallenged. We're going to fight back. Here at When Democrats Turn Out, our mission is to get Democratic voters excited for 2020 and ready to knock on doors, organize their communities, and show up to the polling booth on November 3, 2020 so we can kick Trump out of the White House, retake the Senate, and expand our majority in the House. Peter, we're raising money for each of these vulnerable Democratic House members ahead of the holidays, and we need your help! We cannot afford to lose one seat in the House or risk the majority, so we need you to stand with us. We're looking to raise each candidate $1,000 today, but we're falling short. If we can't support them with a good showing today, the GOP will take that as a sign that their tactics are working and they'll invest millions more. Please help us stop them by giving $10, $25, or whatever you can today here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdto-house-incumbents-nd**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf52/6e9863e8/1703a467/1db0b4f2/3346382538/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdto-house-incumbents-nd?refcode=OUT20191212a.ND&refcode2=SAtXFn9nMpY2vpHKgOB6") Every little bit helps. Thank you, When Democrats Turn Out [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf52/6e9863e8/1703a467/1db0b4f2/3346382538/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdto-house-incumbents-nd?refcode=OUT20191212a.ND&refcode2=SAtXFn9nMpY2vpHKgOB6")

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Jaime is our best chance to beat Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
It's not just enough to win back the White House - we must win the Senate as well | |
---
| Team,

While taking back the White House is important, securing control of the Senate is just as crucial for restoring our democracy.

[It's time to send Lindsey packing - and my friend Jaime Harrison is the one to do it.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b70b/2104799368/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I've watched with dismay as Lindsey Graham has turned from one of President Trump's biggest detractors to one of his most reliable rubber stamps.

[I'm confident that the path to taking back control of the Senate runs through South Carolina - and defeating Lindsey Graham.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b70a/2104799368/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Friends, will you make a split a donation between my campaign and Jaime Harrison 's right now to defeat Lindsey Graham and win back the Senate? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b70b/2104799368/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN TO DEFEAT LINDSEY GRAHAM >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b709/2104799368/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, I'm going to tell you Jaime's story - [I hope you'll take a few moments to read it and then chip in whatever you can to help us defeat Lindsey Graham.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b70b/2104799368/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Jaime was raised by his grandparents in South Carolina.

Growing up, Jaime's family didn't have much, but they taught him the important things: _**hard work matters and character counts.**_

He knows what it's like for a family to have to choose between paying the electric bill and putting food on the table. But Jaime was able to earn a scholarship to Yale University and attend Georgetown Law, and he's spent years helping to get Democrats elected up and down the ticket in South Carolina and across America.

Now, Jaime is running for Senate to fight for opportunity for all South Carolinians, and he knows that when your community needs help, party labels don't matter.

[Pundits have called him a long shot - but they said the same about me in Colorado. I believe in Jaime Harrison. There's no doubt that he's got what it takes to win but he can't do it alone, friends.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b70a/2104799368/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Will you rush a split donation right now, and help Jaime Harrison defeat Lindsey Graham and pull off 2020 's biggest upset in South Carolina?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b70b/2104799368/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b708/2104799368/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91f/134673f2/91ade36/6997b70a/2104799368/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetharrison?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Mike Thompson
subject: our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
Peter,

My Democratic colleagues and I have been working hard everyday since taking the majority in the House to fight for people like you. What we’ve accomplished since then is nothing short of momentous. But Republicans are committed to obstructing our progress at every turn.

Can you donate $5 right now to help safeguard our majority in the House so we can expand on all we have accomplished?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/demaccomplishments?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191212_1_3&amount=5.00&recurring=true

name: Sara Gideon
subject: short email
body:
Here's the truth.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fcf/4bef7a87/6a486fc4/287fefb2/1314942350/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
I was hoping to send a short note about our campaign before the day got away from me. Thank you for reading.
Here's the truth: when we launched this campaign, I wasn't sure what to expect. But the response in our first few months has been overwhelming.
And that depth of support from people like you is not something I take lightly. This is an important race. The result will make a very real difference in the lives of people in Maine and across the country.
So my pledge to you is that we are going to run hard, every day. We are going to talk about the issues that matter most to the people of Maine and we are going to empower our supporters to do the kind of big and important work it will take to win.
Because the truth is, I cannot do this alone. We are taking on virtually the entire Republican Party establishment and powerful special interests who will spend what it takes to protect Susan Collins and preserve the status quo. That's why I have to ask:
**[Can you make a contribution to our campaign today? We're off to an incredible start, but we have so much ground to cover before Election Day.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fcf/4bef7a87/6a486fc4/287fefb1/1314942350/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191212-1-full")**
We aren't taking corporate PAC money in this campaign. Instead, the vast majority of our donations come from lots and lots of people giving small amounts of money. So thank you in advance for chipping in to move us forward.
Have a great rest of the day,
Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fcf/4bef7a87/6a486fc4/287fefb1/1314942350/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191212-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fcf/4bef7a87/6a486fc4/287fefb0/1314942350/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fcf/4bef7a87/6a486fc4/287fefb7/1314942350/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fcf/4bef7a87/6a486fc4/287fefb6/1314942350/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

* * *
_Original Message from John Delaney_
there --

A lot has been said about health care over the course of the Democratic Presidential Primary so far.

**Health care could make or break this election for Democrats.** It's important to me that you know where I stand, so please take a moment to read this:

Like my fellow candidates, I also believe health care is a fundamental human right.

**That 's the underlying premise of BetterCare, my plan to provide universal, quality health care coverage for all Americans.**

BetterCare guarantees that every single American has health coverage by:
1. offering a free public insurance plan to _everyone_ under age 65; and
2. by strengthening Medicare to support everyone over 65.

Unlike many of my fellow candidates who are continuing to push "Medicare for All," my plan offers the option to opt out of BetterCare for a private health insurance policy.

**And unlike "Medicare for All", this plan works.** It won't bankrupt our hospitals and it gives you the choice to control your own health care.

_But to keep beating the drum on this critical issue, we need your help._

**Health care is too important in this election to get it wrong. Please make a donation right now to keep our health care agenda front and center:**

---
Our plan is the most practical way to achieve universal health care coverage in America. Let's go through some of the basics:

**First, can we afford it?** Yes! My BetterCare plan is fully paid for without requiring massive tax increases.

In addition to redirecting our current health care spending, my plan would allow the federal government to negotiate with pharmaceutical companies for lower drug costs (like most major developed countries already do), which could save nearly $850 billion. This is a critical piece of my health care plan, because it makes no sense why Americans pay so much more for medications than people around the world.

**Second, why keep private insurance?** There are quite a few reasons why we should allow private insurance to stay in the mix, but most importantly it gives families more control over the health care they receive.

If you're unhappy with the free federal health insurance plan, you can supplement it with the plan of your choice.

On top of that, it will keep our hospital system solvent by boosting their overall reimbursement rates. The "Medicare for All" plan risks forcing hospitals to close by keeping reimbursement rates the same, which are significantly lower for patients on Medicare than for those on a private insurance plan.

Because at the root of all of this is making sure that the plan we migrate to has to work. It has to be able to pay for itself, and it has to keep our hospitals and doctor offices open.

**Getting this wrong could cost Democrats the election. We can 't afford to let that happen. If you agree, please donate to my campaign today:**
| | [Donate $15 »](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.12_e1_jkd_healthcare_nd&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=15+-+Donate+15nbspraquo&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.12_e1_jkd_healthcare_nd&source=em_fr_2019.12.12_e1_jkd_healthcare_nd")

BetterCare is our best option because it's more than just talking points. It's a practical and real solution to America's health care crisis.

**It works because it gets everyone insured from birth -- with no premiums or tax hikes (unlike "Medicare for All").**

It works for America's small businesses struggling to afford rising premiums. It works for medical professionals who won't be able to keep their practices running on Medicare reimbursement rates alone. And it works for individuals who want to be able to switch jobs, start a new business, or just generally want the security of knowing they have health insurance, no matter what state they live in or what their income level is.

Americans deserve to get the health care coverage that they both want and need. A plan that's a big idea that we can turn into real action to create a more prosperous, more secure, and more just future for every American.

**If you 're with John in this fight, then please pitch in $15 now:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.12_e1_jkd_healthcare_nd&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=21+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.12_e1_jkd_healthcare_nd&source=em_fr_2019.12.12_e1_jkd_healthcare_nd")**

Thanks for hearing me out,
John

It's a comprehensive solution to make sure every American has health care -- and it won 't raise taxes OR drive our country into debt. Read more about John 's plan below, then make a $5 donation to help support our health care plan: | | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=5&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=2+-+5+&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=3+-+25+&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=50&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=4+-+50+&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=100&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=5+-+100+&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=250&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=6+-+250+&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=7+-+OTHER+&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=8+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" Original Message from John Delaney there -- A lot has been said about health care over the course of the Democratic Presidential Primary so far. Health care could make or break this election for Democrats. It's important to me that you know where I stand, so please take a moment to read this: Like my fellow candidates, I also believe health care is a fundamental human right. That 's the underlying premise of BetterCare, my plan to provide universal, quality health care coverage for all Americans. BetterCare guarantees that every single American has health coverage by: 1. offering a free public insurance plan to everyone under age 65; and 2. by strengthening Medicare to support everyone over 65. Unlike many of my fellow candidates who are continuing to push "Medicare for All," my plan offers the option to opt out of BetterCare for a private health insurance policy. And unlike "Medicare for All", this plan works. It won't bankrupt our hospitals and it gives you the choice to control your own health care. But to keep beating the drum on this critical issue, we need your help. Health care is too important in this election to get it wrong. Please make a donation right now to keep our health care agenda front and center: | | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=9+-+Donate+15nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=10+-+Donate+25+raquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=11+-+Donate+50nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=12+-+Donate+100nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=13+-+Donate+250nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=14+-+Other+Amountnbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" Our plan is the most practical way to achieve universal health care coverage in America. Let's go through some of the basics: First, can we afford it? Yes! My BetterCare plan is fully paid for without requiring massive tax increases. In addition to redirecting our current health care spending, my plan would allow the federal government to negotiate with pharmaceutical companies for lower drug costs (like most major developed countries already do), which could save nearly $850 billion. This is a critical piece of my health care plan, because it makes no sense why Americans pay so much more for medications than people around the world. Second, why keep private insurance? There are quite a few reasons why we should allow private insurance to stay in the mix, but most importantly it gives families more control over the health care they receive. If you're unhappy with the free federal health insurance plan, you can supplement it with the plan of your choice. On top of that, it will keep our hospital system solvent by boosting their overall reimbursement rates. The "Medicare for All" plan risks forcing hospitals to close by keeping reimbursement rates the same, which are significantly lower for patients on Medicare than for those on a private insurance plan. Because at the root of all of this is making sure that the plan we migrate to has to work. It has to be able to pay for itself, and it has to keep our hospitals and doctor offices open. Getting this wrong could cost Democrats the election. We can 't afford to let that happen. If you agree, please donate to my campaign today: | | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=15+-+Donate+15nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=16+-+Donate+25+raquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=17+-+Donate+50nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=18+-+Donate+100nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=19+-+Donate+250nbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" | " Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utmmedium=email&utmsource=johndelaney&utmcontent=20+-+Other+Amountnbspraquo&utmcampaign=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend&source=emfr2019.12.12e1jkdhealthcarend" BetterCare is our best option because it's more than just talking points. It's a practical and real solution to America's health care crisis. It works because it gets everyone insured from birth -- with no premiums or tax hikes (unlike "Medicare for All"). It works for America's small businesses struggling to afford rising premiums. It works for medical professionals who won't be able to keep their practices running on Medicare reimbursement rates alone. And it works for individuals who want to be able to switch jobs, start a new business, or just generally want the security of knowing they have health insurance, no matter what state they live in or what their income level is. name: Deb Haaland, Katie Porter, Ayanna Pressley
subject: Our first message as your campaign co-chairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We know that Elizabeth is the right candidate for this fight, because we've seen her story and her plans resonate in our districts, and across the country. But it takes real resources to get her... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b161/45c30650/112831458/66f88c9b/40505928/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're so proud to be your campaign co-chairs for Warren for President, and to be in this fight alongside Elizabeth.

Elizabeth's story speaks to each of us -- as mothers, as fighters, and as change-makers. We didn't run for Congress to keep things the way they are, or to nibble around the edges.

We ran for the House because we wanted to know: What is our government doing to help seniors, and single moms, and young people chasing a brighter future? When will our lawmakers stop listening to big corporations and their lobbyists -- and start listening to the people they represent?

Elizabeth asks those same questions, and she shares in the same fight.

**In 2018, Democrats made change happen. We flipped the House and sent leaders to Washington to fight for working people. And none of us would be there today without the support of grassroots donors.

[ Elizabeth will be a president who always fights for us -- but first, we need to fight for her. As campaign co-chairs, we're asking you today: Will you chip in for the first time to invest in growing this grassroots movement, and help elect Elizabeth as our next president?](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2)** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

| | [DONATE NOW: $100](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2)

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2)
---
>
Each of us knows firsthand what it takes to build a grassroots movement, and to own a piece of the change we're fighting for.

We didn't have personal fortunes to bankroll our campaigns. Instead of chasing special interests, we built our campaigns around our communities. We spoke with a lot of neighbors who didn't see a better future ahead for their kids, even as our economy works better and better for those at the top.

We know that Elizabeth is the right candidate for this fight, because we've seen her story and her plans resonate in our districts, and across the country. **But it takes real resources to get her message out there.

With the first caucuses and primaries just around the corner, we need to make sure this campaign is doing everything we can to grow our grassroots movement -- from hiring more organizers, to opening more offices, to hosting more town halls.

[If we all pitch in -- just like we did in 2018 -- we can beat back the special interests, the super PACs, and the naysayers, and elect a real champion for working families. Please make your first contribution today, and shoulder to shoulder, we'll work to send Elizabeth to the White House.](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM49F_EGR_BIO_S_20191212_V1S2_P_T2)**

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Deb, Katie and Ayanna

Rep. Deb Haaland, New Mexico's 1st Congressional District
Rep. Katie Porter, California's 45th Congressional District
Rep. Ayanna Pressley, Massachusetts's 7th Congressional District

**Help build on our growing momentum. Chip in right now, and we'll send you a free limited edition sticker to say thank you!**

clean_body: We know that Elizabeth is the right candidate for this fight, because we've seen her story and her plans resonate in our districts, and across the country. But it takes real resources to get her... | | | "" We're so proud to be your campaign co-chairs for Warren for President, and to be in this fight alongside Elizabeth. Elizabeth's story speaks to each of us -- as mothers, as fighters, and as change-makers. We didn't run for Congress to keep things the way they are, or to nibble around the edges. We ran for the House because we wanted to know: What is our government doing to help seniors, and single moms, and young people chasing a brighter future? When will our lawmakers stop listening to big corporations and their lobbyists -- and start listening to the people they represent? Elizabeth asks those same questions, and she shares in the same fight. In 2018, Democrats made change happen. We flipped the House and sent leaders to Washington to fight for working people. And none of us would be there today without the support of grassroots donors. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | Each of us knows firsthand what it takes to build a grassroots movement, and to own a piece of the change we're fighting for. We didn't have personal fortunes to bankroll our campaigns. Instead of chasing special interests, we built our campaigns around our communities. We spoke with a lot of neighbors who didn't see a better future ahead for their kids, even as our economy works better and better for those at the top. We know that Elizabeth is the right candidate for this fight, because we've seen her story and her plans resonate in our districts, and across the country. But it takes real resources to get her message out there. With the first caucuses and primaries just around the corner, we need to make sure this campaign is doing everything we can to grow our grassroots movement -- from hiring more organizers, to opening more offices, to hosting more town halls. Thank you for being a part of this team, Deb, Katie and Ayanna Rep. Deb Haaland, New Mexico's 1st Congressional District Rep. Katie Porter, California's 45th Congressional District Rep. Ayanna Pressley, Massachusetts's 7th Congressional District Help build on our growing momentum. Chip in right now, and we'll send you a free limited edition sticker to say thank you! | | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: White House Hosting Childcare, Family Leave Summit With Ivanka Trump
body:
Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump is working "to spark a bipartisan effort to address childcare. The administration is also asking lawmakers..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a61266dd5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **White House Hosting Childcare, Family Leave Summit With Ivanka Trump**

“The White House is hosting a summit on childcare and family leave Thursday in Washington, part of a push that administration officials say could help move forward legislation improving access to assistance for working parents,” Justin Sink and Josh Wingrove report for _Bloomberg._

Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump is working “to spark a bipartisan effort to address childcare. The administration is also asking lawmakers to reauthorize and overhaul a block-grant program that provides childcare subsidies to low-income working families.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d3517e236&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Americans are fair minded. They deserve the truth and can spot it when given even half a chance. If Tuesday’s Quinnipiac poll is any indicator, many Americans recognize that the path to impeachment was paved with lies . . . Apparently, voters understand that the articles — abuse of power and obstruction of Congress — establish nothing impeachable and allege no crime,” Rep. Doug Collins (R-GA) writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8346ba8694&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As the poison of anti-Semitism spreads with dangerous violence throughout Europe, the Middle East, and even here at home — most recently in a horrific attack on Tuesday in Jersey City — President Trump is taking meaningful action to crush this evil.” Yesterday, the President signed an executive order to combat the rise of anti-Semitism across America’s college campuses, Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner writes in [_The New York Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cdeb7f814&e=3ee4985eea) _. _
---
|
---
| “‘The activities we found here don’t vindicate anybody who touched this,’ Justice Department Inspector General Michael Horowitz testified Wednesday — as direct a slap at former FBI chief Jim Comey as you could ask for,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=304b5914be&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Take it from a committed leftist. Writing this week in Vox, Ian Millhiser takes absolutely no pleasure in acknowledging the strength of Trump judicial picks.” The Senate just confirmed President Trump’s 50th addition to the federal appellate courts—a record for this early in a term, James Freeman writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3125e970d9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05a0d4e999&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33f5346c5f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6bf0af191c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
The Trump Administration is coming to an end -- either through impeachment and removal from office, or through next year’s election -- but the true test of our time will be what comes after. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2gA/ni0YAA/t.2xh/S9qj7u_iR3SKcYDcIE7H0A/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwnBhNN-2FeEKLLTOPTgTNuJHY36dhXtzHNEj9WB-2BkA5qTB0CrhjTccTmnV1qK2E6Cc8eCl-2FPSgzKaajXmJmDW3MWVBUV3gUYbaK5S1B5bZDG0RUqEfgPCfMXMr4buduAv6yQtkQ2mKcubpLNkjDpbMzja7UK3Dgo-2FyJ6iJfDC7AuH0ka9N7siGnPaBOyW9tixlE-2BYIMT8IpGHROCIcDSE-2BTGL1sTPcj-2B241WyAPNYWpcYU-3D/6ky8)
Friend, this is a defining moment for our country. Earlier this week, House Democrats announced that they are moving forward with two articles of impeachment against President Trump. This is a monumental step toward holding Trump accountable for his crimes and showing that **no one is above the law.** The Trump Administration is coming to an end -- either through impeachment and removal from office, or through next year’s election -- **but the true test of our time will be what comes after**. Who will fix the mess that Trump has made of our government? How will we set a new standard in our politics and restore the meaning of a government for the people, by the people? **T****he answer is electing progressive champions like Mondaire Jones.** He will usher in a new wave of people-first leadership and fight for the families who have been hurt most by Trump’s administration.**[Will you chip in $5 to support our campaign and movement to transform our politics?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2gA/ni0YAA/t.2xh/S9qj7u_iR3SKcYDcIE7H0A/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwnBhNN-2FeEKLLTOPTgTNuJHY36dhXtzHNEj9WB-2BkA5qTBfRD2cfi9MzaRaqjliHOXpvfk6GPnNpnO0ENehj4xkrZVil3YQc-2BsQvBjMln6t2gWT55Zdrd4-2B2NxkdlwhA2UhdrnowJxV8oigSuVINxAbWIijXIM-2F0b9a2phMoQKTVZBfXSu-2FlLNopo52vavMYzbB7uQceCGKBosFENwL-2FCwMmOggo3w4RJag3umc87lIQgI-3D/khLy)** **** When Trump finally leaves the White House, one way or the other, we’ll need an army of strong, progressive leaders to address the damage Trump’s made and usher in a new era of change. **Together, we will write the next chapter in American politics and make sure we come out of this moment of crisis stronger and more united than ever.** That’s why Mondaire Jones is determined to bring his bold, progressive agenda to Congress and make sure that, even after Trump, our leaders act like leaders. He’s proudly supported issues like a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and impeachment since day 1 of his campaign: there’s no doubt he’ll be just as fearless fighting for us in Congress. **But clean_body: The Trump Administration is coming to an end -- either through impeachment and removal from office, or through next year’s election -- but the true test of our time will be what comes after. | | | Friend, this is a defining moment for our country. Earlier this week, House Democrats announced that they are moving forward with two articles of impeachment against President Trump. This is a monumental step toward holding Trump accountable for his crimes and showing that no one is above the law. The Trump Administration is coming to an end -- either through impeachment and removal from office, or through next year’s election -- but the true test of our time will be what comes after. Who will fix the mess that Trump has made of our government? How will we set a new standard in our politics and restore the meaning of a government for the people, by the people? The answer is electing progressive champions like Mondaire Jones. He will usher in a new wave of people-first leadership and fight for the families who have been hurt most by Trump’s administration. ** When Trump finally leaves the White House, one way or the other, we’ll need an army of strong, progressive leaders to address the damage Trump’s made and usher in a new era of change. Together, we will write the next chapter in American politics and make sure we come out of this moment of crisis stronger and more united than ever. That’s why Mondaire Jones is determined to bring his bold, progressive agenda to Congress and make sure that, even after Trump, our leaders act like leaders. He’s proudly supported issues like a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and impeachment since day 1 of his campaign: there’s no doubt he’ll be just as fearless fighting for us in Congress. But Mondaire can’t do this by himself: he needs a grassroots army at his side to make sure he can win this race and actually make it to Congress. **** ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

A woman's right to choose is in jeopardy, Team. Republicans across this country are fighting to strip away abortion access by overturning Roe v. Wade.
With multiple restrictive state abortion laws making their way to the Supreme Court, Republicans think this is their chance to overturn Roe v. Wade. With Donald Trump in the White House, Mitch McConnell in the Senate and Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, **a woman 's right to choose has never been more at risk. **
Democrats are fighting back, but we need to hear from grassroots supporters like you. Tell us before midnight:

name: Team Monika
subject: Monika is on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
A leader who listens, cares, and then acts. That's Monika.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d933/7dfbb003/42a8c213/5527b8cc/628020320/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&source=rtw_20191212_em_ballot")
---
Friend,

**We have some great news: Yesterday, Monika officially filed to run for Congress!** Monika's husband, Bobby, and her daughter, Gabbie, came out to help her file. [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d933/7dfbb003/42a8c213/5527b8cd/628020320/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&source=rtw_20191212_em_ballot") Gabbie left a sweet note for Monika:

_Today my mom filed to run for Congress! I am so proud of her! I know this will be a hard race but my mom is the best candidate! She is firm (trust me, I know) but also fair. She listens to people and really cares about all citizens. Many have heard that I was her inspiration to run for Wake County School Board... "be the solution!" But today, you are my inspiration! You got this, mom!_

A leader who listens, cares, and then acts. That's Monika.

[**Click here to donate $20.20, or whatever you can, to help us raise the funds we need to put a fierce fighter for women, children and survivors in office:**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d933/7dfbb003/42a8c213/5527b8c2/628020320/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&amount=20.20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+to+donate+2020+or+whatever+yo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&source=rtw_20191212_em_ballot") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5»](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d933/7dfbb003/42a8c213/5527b8c3/628020320/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=4+-+5raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&source=rtw_20191212_em_ballot")

Thank you,

Team Monika
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d933/7dfbb003/42a8c213/5527b8c5/628020320/VEsHBQ/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=10+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=rtw_20191212_em_ballot&source=rtw_20191212_em_ballot")

He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. Will you be a part of this historic movement? ""** We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

| | **The Democratic National Committee just announced that I will not be on stage for the December debate. But although we won 't be on stage, we've been shaping the debate from day one:**
* I was the first to discuss immigration, an issue that will be critical in the general election
* I was the first to discuss support for the transgender community, the first in debate history
* I was the first to discuss housing, an important issue to millions of families
* I was the first to name the names of lives lost to police violence
* I was the ONLY candidate to say Iowa and New Hampshire, two overwhelmingly white states, shouldn't vote first

**We 've shown that we don't need a debate to see the differences between candidates....** ...the difference is, I'm the candidate most focused on vulnerable communities, the candidate most focused on the middle class AND the poor, and the candidate who is willing to tell the truth when others won't. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Christi Warner Beyer
subject: My mother always told me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,
My mom Carolyn Warner told me my entire life before each election, "_Christi, this is the most important election of our lifetime_ ".
This year I think her words are more true than ever before. Elections are about the future and our country is at a crossroads. We need honest and strong representatives in Congress who will do the right thing.
**That 's why I'm Co-Hosting a holiday fundraiser for Congressman Stanton this Saturday December 14th from 6-8pm and I would like to invite you to join us. (You can find the full details on the invite below.) **
**[If you'd like to attend, you can RSVP here with this link >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/uzKLmVNT6smtIftrmOQ-OUb92XK2IGaRAklCibaBj6s=/CRhQXs_ZbdjU-YMRK8pG1iv95AoISCkHH7Vo0igUuCU=)**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/uzKLmVNT6smtIftrmOQ-OUb92XK2IGaRAklCibaBj6s=/CRhQXs_ZbdjU-YMRK8pG1iv95AoISCkHH7Vo0igUuCU=)

I hope you can make it to the event, but for those of you that can't __please consider__ making a donation. It is very important that we keep Greg in his seat in Congress and keep America moving in the right direction.
**Please give what you can. There is no donation too small and all are appreciated. They will be put to good use!**
**[If you can't attend, but would like to make a contribution, you can CONTRIBUTE using this link >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/uzKLmVNT6smtIftrmOQ-OUb92XK2IGaRAklCibaBj6s=/bTthPWZlJnfL93RsmVm_eb5A8cwPj-De6uwaWXNBe60=?refcode=X_121219_Invite_HolidayFundraiser_C)**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/uzKLmVNT6smtIftrmOQ-OUb92XK2IGaRAklCibaBj6s=/bTthPWZlJnfL93RsmVm_eb5A8cwPj-De6uwaWXNBe60=?refcode=X_121219_Invite_HolidayFundraiser_C)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uzKLmVNT6smtIftrmOQ-OUb92XK2IGaRAklCibaBj6s=/5KBCSI-HZAvOqIc_z3teH6BmuF0ILV3olz25Zu0fhfQ=)

Thank you and I hope to see you Saturday!

\-- _Christi Warner Beyer_

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Tell Congress it's past time to protect the DREAMers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment inquiry. The DACA program, which protects DREAMers from deportation, is before the Supreme Court, and Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. [**Congress has the ability to stop this by passing legislation guaranteeing the continuation of the program, but the GOP is so caught up in Trump 's racism, xenophobia, and political backstabbing that they can't see the bigger picture. Add your name to ours and call on Congress to protect DREAMers now!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf50/6e9863e8/173d8a33/1db0b4f5/2451512323/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/dreamers-trump/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf50/6e9863e8/173d8a33/1db0b4f5/2451512323/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/dreamers-trump/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

subject: Spano had failed Floridians once again…

name: Rainee Taylor
subject: Sorry Elsa -- we can't let it go.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our deadline is TOMORROW.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8372?t=3&akid=8007%2E868730%2EStGZYe) Friend, I get it -- right now, when you think of the words "freeze" or "frozen," very specific images come to mind: [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8372?t=4&akid=8007%2E868730%2EStGZYe) Or because winter's really just beginning, but it's still pretty freakin' cold: [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8372?t=5&akid=8007%2E868730%2EStGZYe) But our freeze is a little different: A fundraising freeze starting TOMORROW at midnight. And unlike Elsa, we really can't just "let it go." Our opponents -- all six of them, including the #1 sponsor of right-wing ballot initiatives Tim Eyman -- can keep on fundraising. With the help of the Republican Governors Association, who is sitting on more than a hundred million dollars, they'll seize this opportunity to rake in cash while we are hard at work in the Capitol getting things done. **We could come out of the freeze hundreds of thousands of dollars behind our opponents in fundraising -- that's why we NEED to be prepared.** [**Our $50,000 goal is coming up TOMORROW: Can you donate $1 or more now to fund the fight ahead?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8372?t=6&akid=8007%2E868730%2EStGZYe) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8373?t=7&akid=8007%2E868730%2EStGZYe)

clean_body: | | | | Friend, Too many politicians think first about themselves, then about the corporations who paid for their campaigns, and then about the needs of the American people — but Tom is the opposite of most insider politicians. He wants to address the issues working families care about, not special interest groups or corporate lobbyists. Tom called for Trump’s impeachment way before it was politically expedient. And while Congress has not passed a single piece of meaningful legislation on the climate crisis, Tom has been organizing at the grassroots level for the last 10 years to fight corporations and accomplish big climate wins. This team is moving in the right direction, friend — and we’re glad you’re on it. Onward, Tom 2020 | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . name: MJ Hegar
subject: I get the job done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:

| | Hey Peter,

When I take on a fight, I see it through to the end. It was true when I was a Medevac pilot in Afghanistan and worked with my crew to get our patients to safety after the Taliban shot us down. It was true when I took on the Pentagon -- and worked with both political parties -- to open ground combat roles to women.

And it's true now, too. I'm going to see this fight through to the end, and work my tail off every step of the way to defeat Senator Cornyn. [**So I'm asking you to join me in that fight, and donate right now to help fuel this campaign >>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906e0/7f51f7bc/4a5f82b6/4ef0fffe/2081603996/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191212.1nd__617__&amount=10&recurring=true")

The first step to defeating Senator Cornyn is winning the primary and proving that I'm the candidate who can beat him. We've got fewer than 90 days to do that, so it's officially crunch time.

Sen. Cornyn is vulnerable -- in fact, _Roll Call_ ranked him as one of the top ten most vulnerable senators in the whole country! And _The Hill_ reported that our campaign is leading the Democratic pack. This is our moment: with a strong, enthusiastic team alongside me, we can beat Sen. Cornyn and take this Texas Senate seat back from special interest control!

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Take a look at our new climate crisis ad:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
It’s over for big polluters

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK) Yang Gang --

We just launched a new ad where I outline what steps need to be taken to address the disastrous effects of climate change.

The truth is that the time to take action was years ago. So there’s no time to waste, and I’ll prioritize taking action on day one of my presidency.

[Take a look at our new ad and chip in to keep it on the air: ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19617?t=5&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19617?t=8&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK) Everyone is going to be affected by climate change, especially our country’s most vulnerable populations. We can’t leave anyone behind.

But it’s over for big polluters. We need to stop giving them subsidies and tax breaks and start investing that money in solutions that will heal our climate and make our environment healthier for our children.

[If you’re with me, watch our new ad and contribute $10 or whatever you can. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19617?t=7&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19617?t=6&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK)
---
It’s going to be tough, but together we can mitigate some of the devastation that’s coming.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19617?t=9&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4649%2E377263%2EayB7FK) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

subject: Get Congress Back to Work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, **Congress has wasted the past few months working to impeach President Trump instead of working on real issues that the American people care about.** After countless hearings, witnesses, and testimony – there was no evidence that President Trump committed any impeachable offenses.
Congress wasted time and our taxpayer dollars on a giant scavenger hunt – only to find nothing. Tiffany Shedd knows that Congress should be working for the people. That includes lowering our national debt, funding the border wall, and keeping America safe.
Join Tiffany in telling Congress to get back to work. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: New proof that the Left has been lying
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Have you read the Inspector General report on the abuses by the FBI? It's pretty damning. Most of all, it proves that Adam Schiff and the mainstream media have been lying to the country about the faux Trump-Russia collusion and the FBI's efforts to spy on the Trump campaign.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Sign the petition: Save Kentuckians’ food stamps!
body:
|
---
Folks, Thanks to a cruel new policy, 40,000 Kentuckians could lose their food stamps next year. And Mitch McConnell is too busy blocking lifesaving legislation in the Senate to bother to do anything about it. [_**Will you click here to sign my petition to demand that Mitch stops this inhumane policy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12806584/132168981/-1800465067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=&emci=58431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=59431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12806585/132168982/-1800465067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=&emci=58431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=59431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570) Mitch doesn’t care about Kentuckians who depend on food stamps. He once said that business leaders have a “hard time finding people to do the work because they’re doing too good with food stamps, Social Security and all the rest.” That wasn’t true for my mom, who worked multiple jobs and still struggled to put food on the table. When there wasn’t enough food for both of us, my mom sometimes went without so I wouldn’t have to. Food stamps were a life source for us. Sadly, I remember when I was a kid and felt ashamed when the cashier would ring up our groceries and my mom would hand them our food stamps. I now know there was nothing to be ashamed of — people like Mitch just make it seem that way. I am grateful for the times we actually had food to eat. Now, the federal government could kick thousands of Kentuckians off their food stamps if they can’t find work. To take food off the table of someone who’s having trouble finding a job is unnecessary and cruel. [_**Mitch can prevent this. He’s the most powerful man in Washington. Sign my petition to demand that he stops this disastrous policy from going into effect.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12806586/132168983/-1800465067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=&emci=58431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=59431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12806587/132168984/-1800465067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=&emci=58431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=59431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570) While Mitch looks out for his own wallet and his political ambitions, we’re looking out for the people of Kentucky. Thanks for powering this movement for change. Charles Booker [Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12806588/132168985/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191212_m&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=) [Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12806589/132168986/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191212_o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=) | Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, **[will you donate to his exploratory committee?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12806590/132168987/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191212_footer&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=)**

Charles Booker Exploratory Committee
PO BOX 11081
Louisville, KY 40251
United States

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, you can click here: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/58431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68/59431b98-4a1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQzMWI5OC00YTFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-8-iVgY7XXV9yZ8Txd7CJkPo4pSUZuZOaIvEzVVOls=&id=103861571&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Cal Cunningham
subject: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight on our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there --
In case you don't know me, I'm Cal Cunningham. I'm a lifelong North Carolinian and a veteran, and now, I'm running for U.S. Senate in North Carolina. Together, we're going to win this seat. Let me explain why:
My opponent, Thom Tillis, is weak. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight lists him as the third most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country and a recent string of polls shows us defeating him.
I'm ready to take him on. We're putting together the team that will win next November -- but we'll only succeed with your help.
[**If you can, please pitch in $3 or more now to help us win this seat and take back the Senate.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc319/2a380d31/22ffb05b/f0e283/765101836/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y3VubmluZ2hhbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMjEyX213aDRjYWxfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cunningham?refcode=e20191212_mwh4cal_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
We've got a chance to make the Senate a place where Maggie and I can work together to take on the challenges facing folks in New Hampshire and North Carolina. All we need to do is flip four seats, and we'll have a Democratic majority that can actually make progress on issues ranging from health care to the climate crisis.
But to do that, we need to win in North Carolina.
I hope you'll join me as we work to replace Thom Tillis and take back the Senate for Democrats. [**You can click right here to help.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc319/2a380d31/22ffb05b/f0e283/765101836/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y3VubmluZ2hhbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMjEyX213aDRjYWxfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cunningham?refcode=e20191212_mwh4cal_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks for all you do.
--Cal

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New Article: ���Embracing Chaos in the Trump Era���
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=221d8829b4e542478b89a9357ed9226a&_e=GqilBONWyZd1oageHpn0VDsyiXcON2XlOOI5FMtMos0Qm5s3uW-2T874Q5LPhzBgBRApPlgu_zHf2NdcfUP7zGn6Tz68Z2as17bnD1qIUPHQV6eU30UoQXcbx0JHKx8zI1zzLDZONo4CeWDqbqvxwE6ScIMmawLKo98HYb-Hs7g6P7ivMf-ulHyKYiTbLCXSMyTjHc_sMgQ4D4zZuEswwBnPCwTQP69VCJNBfztKf_mpgBX4y6GTnRGCK2_keKdc0nO3uokahJeMtMgjwSKU8w%3D%3D) I want to make sure you had a chance to read my new article in the National Review, _“Embracing Chaos in the Trump Era.”_ As I wrote, Trump has an amazing ability to excite both his supporters and his critics; rare is the individual who has not taken a side. His strongest partisans think that Trump can do no wrong, and they show a remarkable ability to shift their previous ideological commitments in order to accommodate the president’s latest policy positions. Trump’s critics show the same consistency in opposing Trump, even when it means they must abandon their previous positions. Despite all evidence to the contrary, Trump’s critics and some of his supporters seem to keep hoping that he will change his ways. Yet Trump thrives in the chaos he helps to create, and it is hard to imagine him pursuing a predictable, mundane path. But that would be bad TV, bad for ratings and bad for the reality star, not to mention a betrayal of the promise of fundamental change he made to voters. Whether by design or instinct, Trump creates the chaotic environment in which he naturally thrives. The Democrats continue to play into his hands, getting sucked into these battles time after time, blinded by their hatred for him. They inevitably lose these fights, but, like Charlie Brown trying to kick the football, they keep repeating the cycle, hoping for a different outcome. Voters may eventually tire of the turmoil and turn to a more predicable governing style. But don’t bet on it; the Left wants divisiveness and is far too angry to pursue a rational approach. In the meantime, buckle up and enjoy the ride — the intensity and pace are likely to get stronger and faster. Sincerely, Bobby Jindal [Click here](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=221d8829b4e542478b89a9357ed9226a&_e=GqilBONWyZd1oageHpn0VFi_aJiuT_hnVUOLZ3kFoOfesxhRBwMopqddX0XkcYW5L_EgRdcm6PxjoU8H9gtoSFb4kprw1ApeJHF9H5agSDqQEXIJtiLe8yaoGL05b8qbFGHO3f1nZCQysIh_Cd51ejanfRddB3Kt-hZowArGkPvUyBsvhyCpQhUr_H7w5xjnNBWWVlG1uPXPysdMMztcbcu_cPl6Wfl11auw5e8LWB3Qmp64w9M-Y9lofKcTyFCC4ymbPt-XMZcdnZOtXoZhd5wsSUSyhEUq8nW5FbBBj0NxqUWNj9GTQNLsg2Egbkyf) to read the entire article, and let me know what you think. [ UNSUBSCRIBE HERE ](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=221d8829b4e542478b89a9357ed9226a&_t=h_V-p5C5qnBYT679raMyQ6RHaW6cT7mKPPOtQNuWCV0EoCZgec85mC4z4MNmt6WXGz27QlIfKQ3fFIFTdLtgfE4Xig4QgTFquLaf8Wmr-J8DnXtXS1LwfAx1IY5IQk_CCqUTwW2imoR-g4vCfgdAS3FITJQu_sxoFhk42xKaBWg%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320
---

name: Carlson, Laura
subject: re: your digital interview
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team - I've been putting together a list of our top supporters - people who have consistently been up to date with Democratic news and have been a huge help in setting our day-to-day strategy. **Team, your name is on that list. **
