name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump is putting parents back in charge
body:
Conservatives know that strong families are what make America thrive. They build up our neighborhoods, sustain our communities, pass down our values. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=502480146c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 12, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump is putting parents back in charge**
---
| **Conservatives know** that strong families are what make America thrive. They build up our neighborhoods, sustain our communities, pass down our values, and create a brighter future for every American citizen.

**Yet for years** , Washington has treated families as an afterthought—at best—and an outright barrier to “progress” at worst. President Donald J. Trump knows that bureaucrats shouldn’t have the final say in raising our kids. So from child care to school choice to paid family leave, the Trump Administration is putting parents back in control.

**🎬** **Watch:** [President Trump is putting control back into parents’ hands!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bdac293d93&e=3ee4985eea)

**Today, President Trump** and Ivanka Trump hosted a White House Summit on Child Care and Paid Family Leave. “Our goal is simple,” the President said. “We want to expand child care options and reduce unnecessary regulations so that parents can choose the best care for their children, including, and very importantly, in-home and faith-based care.”

**After all,** how families balance work and raising children is a deeply personal choice. Government’s mission should be to support parents as they make the best decision possible for their families, not to dictate a one-size-fits-all “solution” for every household.

**That support** begins with access to quality child care, both from safe providers and from parents themselves. “In more than 60 percent of American homes, both parents work,” President Trump said. “Yet many struggle to afford child care, which often costs more than $10,000 per year. And it’s devastating to families, frankly. Devastating.”

**Help is on the way.** In his State of the Union Address this February, President Trump called for Congress to pass paid family leave into law. One week ago, legislators introduced “very strong bipartisan legislation, Paid Family Leave legislation,” the President said today. “We were thrilled.”

**This kind of support **for working families has defined the Trump Administration’s economic and social agenda since day one:
* The President signed legislation last year securing historic funding for the Child Care and Development Block Grant, which helps low-income families access quality child care programs.

* The Trump tax cuts included a new tax credit that incentivizes companies to offer paid family leave to their employees.

* The Administration worked with Congress to secure paid parental leave for all Federal employees as part of the National Defense Authorization Act.

* The President’s tax cuts also _doubled_ the child tax credit, benefitting more than 40 million American families with an average of over $2,200 apiece this year.

**Without a booming economy,** none of this progress would be possible. Last year alone, nearly 300,000 American families were lifted out of poverty. In that same period, more than 600,000 children being raised by single mothers were lifted from poverty, too.

**“We have a chance** to give all moms and dads the resources and support they need to succeed, thrive, flourish, prosper, and help their sons and daughters reach their amazing God-given potential,” President Trump said.

[“Ivanka Trump goes to bat for working moms, ‘hardest, most rewarding job on Earth’”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0deabf1203&e=3ee4985eea)

**The facts:** [How the Trump Administration is supporting working families](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=342f66b441&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Tia Dufour
| **President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks at the White House Summit on Child Care and Paid Leave: Supporting America’s Working Families** | December 12, 2019
---
|

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ad/3eb3e2fc/696891e8/744ee7a7/481913674/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191212_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191212_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ad/3eb3e2fc/696891e8/744ee7a6/481913674/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191212_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191212_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ad/3eb3e2fc/696891e8/744ee7a5/481913674/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191212_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191212_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Carly Reilly
subject: We’ve got good news and bad news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
The good news is that we’ve got the best supporters!

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=5&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi) **With only THREE days left, we’re in danger of not reaching our goal!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=8&amount=25&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---
Yang Gang --

**Here’s the good news:** We’ve seen a surge in fundraising over the last 24 hours and we’re now within striking distance of hitting our goal.

**Here’s the not-so-good news:** We only have three days left, and right now we’re still short of reaching our goal. Honestly, _we might not hit it._

**It’s really important that we hit this goal.** We’ll be able to fully fund our bus tour across Iowa and keep our ads on in the early states like Iowa and New Hampshire.

If we don’t, we’ll need to cut back at the worst possible moment -- and at this point in the race, we can’t afford to let that happen.

**If every person reading this email chips in $5 or more right now, we’ll easily hit $2 million.

[Andrew doesn’t have tons of wealthy donors -- so only you can help us reach our goal. Please, Yang Gang, chip in what you can before the clock runs out in THREE days. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=7&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)**
[Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=6&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---
Thanks for everything you do,

Carly Reilly
Finance Director
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19648?t=14&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4683%2E377263%2EE_WrJi) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
